Container.Name: KindRobots-ProxySQL
Container.Overview: ProxySQL database proxy for the Kind Robots stack. It accepts application MySQL/MariaDB connections on port 6033 and maintains a controlled backend pool toward MariaDB. Keep the admin interface on port 6032 private.
Container.Requires: Do not expose admin port 6032 to the public internet. Create the proxysql.cnf file before first start; see the repository setup guide.

Config.Name: MySQL Client Port
Config.Description: Application-facing MySQL/MariaDB protocol port. Point Kind Robots at this port after ProxySQL is configured and tested.

Config.Name: Admin Port
Config.Description: ProxySQL administration port. Restrict this port to the Unraid LAN; never forward it publicly.

Config.Name: ProxySQL Data
Config.Description: Persistent ProxySQL runtime database and state.

Config.Name: ProxySQL Config
Config.Description: ProxySQL bootstrap configuration file. Create this host file using docs/proxysql.md before starting the container.
